title: [CI:BUILD] Add dedicated DOWNLOAD doc w/ links to bins
body:
Fixes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/15960

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: LGTM, Looks like its useful but definitely needs to be updated if things change.

> but definitely needs to be updated if things change.

That's a good point actually.  Let me add a comment to that cirrus-ci task to remind maintainers to update links.  I can also add a comment to the doc itself, pointing people at where the files come from...
...Oh! and I should probably link to the downloads document from somewhere :blush: ...
Force-push: Rebased, added link in `README.md` and comments regarding maintaince.
I think this PR is ready for final review.
